Performance Strategy

"Truth is not what you want it to be; it is what it is. And you must bend to its power or live a lie."

— Miyamoto Musashi

Weekly Structure

Day One
Sparring at 40–50 percent intensity
Day Two
Strength session, 35–45 minutes
Day Three
Rest or 30-minute easy zone-2 cardio
Day Four
Pad and bag session 5x3
Day Five
Strength session, 35–45 minutes
Day Six
Pad and bag 5x3, technical focus, no sparring
Day Seven
Full rest, long walk
